LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT MARY ELIADES MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. WHILE THE FILING OF THE SEPARATE ACTION WAS ERRONEOUS UNDER CCP 1292.6, PETITIONER LAPPANO DID NOT VIOLATE CCP 128.7. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-20-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

No other appearance. Tentative ruling is adopted.
RESPONDENT MARY ELIADES Motion For Sanctions is denied. While the filing of the separate action was erroneous under CCP 1292.6, petitioner Lappano did not violate CCP 128.7. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
